title: Hyderabadi Tomato Dal
description: Structured dataset row for Telangana dal
ingredients: 1 cup toor dal | 2 tomatoes | 0.5 tsp turmeric | 1 tsp chilli powder | 1 tbsp oil | 1 tsp mustard seeds | 1 pinch salt
instructions: Wash dal and pressure cook with turmeric until soft | Mash the dal and add chopped tomatoes | Simmer until the tomatoes soften | Heat oil and splutter mustard seeds | Add the tempering to dal and simmer for five minutes

title: Bengali Cholar Dal
description: Structured dataset row for Bengal chana dal
ingredients: 1 cup chana dal | 1 tbsp ghee | 1 tsp cumin | 1 tsp ginger | 2 tbsp coconut | 1 pinch salt
instructions: Soak chana dal and cook until tender | Heat ghee and add cumin | Add ginger and coconut and saute briefly | Add cooked dal and salt | Simmer until thick and aromatic

title: Punjabi Jeera Aloo
description: Structured dataset row for Punjabi potato dish
ingredients: 4 potatoes | 1 tbsp oil | 1 tsp cumin | 0.5 tsp turmeric | 1 tsp coriander powder | 1 pinch salt
instructions: Boil potatoes until just tender | Peel and cube the potatoes | Heat oil and crackle cumin seeds | Add spices and potatoes | Toss until the potatoes are coated and lightly crisp
